negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for barutin_cove_negative
% SZS output start Proof for barutin_cove_negative
1. located_in(barutin_cove,snow_island) [input(axiom)]
2. located_in(snow_island,south_shetland_islands) [input(axiom)]
5. located_in(south_shetland_islands,antarctica) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((located_in(X0,X1) & located_in(X1,X2)) => located_in(X0,X2)) [input(axiom)]
7. located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [flattening 8]
10. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (located_in(X0,X2) | (~located_in(X0,X1) | ~located_in(X1,X2))) [ennf transformation 6]
11. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (located_in(X0,X2) | ~located_in(X0,X1) | ~located_in(X1,X2)) [flattening 10]
12. located_in(barutin_cove,snow_island) [cnf transformation 1]
13. located_in(snow_island,south_shetland_islands) [cnf transformation 2]
16. located_in(south_shetland_islands,antarctica) [cnf transformation 5]
17. ~located_in(X1,X2) | ~located_in(X0,X1) | located_in(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 11]
18. ~located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [cnf transformation 9]
20. ~located_in(X0,snow_island) | located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands) [resolution 17,13]
21. ~located_in(X0,south_shetland_islands) | located_in(X0,antarctica) [resolution 17,16]
24. located_in(barutin_cove,south_shetland_islands) [resolution 20,12]
28. located_in(barutin_cove,antarctica) [resolution 24,21]
30. $false [forward subsumption resolution 28,18]
% SZS output end Proof for barutin_cove_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
